# Ultima IV dungeon: covetous
# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — 8 levels of 8x8 (nibble-coded), then the room-data block.
# format: ascii-dungeon v1  size=8 levels=8
# legend (char  hex  kind):
#   ~  00  corridor
#   !  10  ladder_up
#   $  20  ladder_down
#   %  30  ladder_both
#   &  40  chest
#   '  70  fountain
#   (  80  field
#   )  81  field_1
#   *  8e  field_e
#   +  92  room_2
#   ,  93  room_3
#   -  a0  altar
#   .  b0  door_special
#   /  c0  kind_c
#   0  d0  door
#   1  d1  door_1
#   2  d2  door_2
#   3  d3  door_3
#   4  d4  door_4
#   5  d5  door_5
#   6  d6  door_6
#   7  d7  door_7
#   8  d8  door_8
#   9  d9  door_9
#   :  da  door_a
#   ;  db  door_b
#   <  dc  door_c
#   =  dd  door_d
#   >  de  door_e
#   ?  df  door_f
#   @  e0  room_marker
#   F  f0  wall
#
== level 0 ==
|FFF~~~FF|
|F!~~F0~$|
|FFF~~~FF|
|/~FFF~~~|
|F+F,FFFF|
|FFF~(---|
|F~~~FFFF|
|/~FFF~~~|
== level 1 ==
|FFFFFFFF|
|F~~~~~~!|
|F~FFFFFF|
|F~F~~~~~|
|F~F~FFF~|
|F~F~~$F~|
|F~FFFFF~|
|F~~~~~~~|
== level 2 ==
|FFFFFFFF|
|~~~~~~F$|
|FFFFF~FF|
|/~~5F~/~|
|FFF4FFF~|
|F'321!F~|
|FFFFFFF~|
|F$~~~~~~|
== level 3 ==
|FFF/FFFF|
|F*F&F(/!|
|F/FFF/F/|
|F(6$7(/(|
|F/FFF/FF|
|/(/)/*F&|
|F/F/F/FF|
|F!/(F*/)|
== level 4 ==
|FFFFFFF&|
|F&&&&&F&|
|F&FFF&F&|
|F&F%F&F&|
|F&FFF&F&|
|F$&&&&F&|
|FFFFFFF&|
|&&&&&&&$|
== level 5 ==
|FFFFF~F~|
|F(~'~(~~|
|F~F~F~F~|
|F~~%~~~(|
|F~F~FFFF|
|~%~~F(~'|
|F~F~F~F~|
|~'~(F~~!|
== level 6 ==
|FFFFF~FF|
|F$89@~@.|
|FFFFF~FF|
|~~~!F$~~|
|FFF:FFFF|
|~!F;~~~~|
|FFF<FFFF|
|~~~~F$~~|
== level 7 ==
|FF~F~FFF|
|=!>F~~~F|
|~FFFFF@F|
|~F~?F!@F|
|~F~FFF@F|
|~F~F~~~F|
|~F~F~FFF|
|~F~F~!F?|
# crc32: cc847b5f
